commands: sudo -u ubuntu bash -lc 'pm2 describe mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge' | tr -cd '\11\12\15\40-\176' | sed -n '1,80p'

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs/mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out.log')
lines = p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines() if p.exists() else []
print('total_lines=' + str(len(lines)))
keys = ('Bridge is ready','Listening to group','Disconnected','Scheduling reconnect','Reconnecting','Watchdog','Auth failure','authenticated','Failed','Forwarding','Recorded','Could not resolve','No OIF','Ignored non-media','startup','QR code')
matched = [ln for ln in lines if any(k in ln for k in keys)]
print('matched=' + str(len(matched)))
for ln in matched[-60:]:
    print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
print('--- last 15 raw ---')
for ln in lines[-15:]:
    print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
PY
